blocks.text: Bø leads Norway's 20km charge as Arsenal breathe after Villa stumble
⛷️ 16:10 — Biathlon Men's 20km Individual, Kontiolahti: Bø brothers and Lægreid hunt gold
Wolves' 2-0 win gifts Arsenal five points of daylight over City. Sunday's London derby — Chelsea at the Emirates — is now must-win for the Blues, 16 points adrift.
